message:
fix(filters): validate category from URL before casting

Previously, any string from the URL was cast directly to PromptCategory
without validation. This could allow invalid category values to be used.

Now the category is validated against the list of valid categories
before being accepted. Invalid values (including empty strings) result
in null, which means "no filter".

Updated test expectation to match correct behavior: empty string is
not a valid category, so it should return null.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
